name: Koorma Vegetable Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a wok.
2. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
3. Add garlic and continue cooking until onion is golden.
4. Add tomatoes, chiles, ginger, salt, and spices.
5. Bring to a simmer, then stir in potatoes, cauliflower, and carrots.
6. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the cilantro and simmer for another 20 minutes over low heat until vegetables are tender but firm.
8. If needed, add additional water to form a sauce; do not add so much that it becomes soupy.
9. Steam string beans separately until bright green and crisp-tender.
10. Stir the steamed string beans into the vegetable mixture.
11. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt.
12. Serve immediately.
